title: The Da Vinci Code
posterAlt: The Da Vinci Code (2006) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A murder in Paris’ Louvre Museum and cryptic clues in some of Leonardo da Vinci’s most famous paintings lead to the discovery of a religious mystery. For 2,000 years a secret society closely guards information that — should it come to light — could rock the very foundations of Christianity.
synopsis: The Da Vinci Code is a 2006 thriller and mystery film from United States and France. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
